title: Fallout 4 props CIT
description: Adds a bunch of Fallout 4 food items and other items as CIT models, with more possibly planned
body:
Optifine/CIT Resewn required

Using an invisible item frames pack is recommended, but not included here ([here's a good one i use by someone else](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/koolcattv-s-invisible-item-frames/))

Rename a stick with the names from the list (any capitalisation) to get the model/item. 

The pack was only tested with 1.20.1 Optifine and CIT Resewn, so I don't know of any issues outside of these. I am also open to suggestions for what to add.

List of models:
-     Abraxo Cleaner
-     Blamco Mac n Cheese
-     Cooler
-     Cram
-     Cutting Board
-     Dandy Boy Apples
-     Empty Ceramic Bowl
-     Empty Ceramic Bowl Stack
-     Empty Nuka Cola
-     Fancy Lads Snack Cakes
-     Instamash
-     Empty Milk Bottle
-     Noodle Bowl
-     Nuka Cola
-     Nuka Cola Cherry
-     Nuka Cola Quantum
-     Nuka Cola Machine
-     Pork n Beans
-     Empty Pot
-     Noodle Pot
-     Radio
-     Salisbury Steak
-     Sugar Bombs
-     Prewar Sugar Bombs
-     Terminal
-     TV Dinner Tray
-     Yum Yum Deviled Eggs
